characters.description: An independent cultivator travelling by sea and accepted by the ship's crew. He places their safety above his own when a powerful sea spirit beast threatens the vessel. Sen intends to meet his existing obligations before attempting a much longer journey across the continent.
characters.name: Sen

characters.description: A compassionate sect disciple who has spent weeks caring for three men trapped in severe mental and emotional torment. After her sect's specialists fail to help them, a hostile elder assigns her the dangerous task of finding the cultivator responsible and bringing that person back.
characters.name: Li Yi Nuo

characters.description: A sect elder who deliberately gives Li Yi Nuo a nearly suicidal mission to recover the cultivator responsible for three disciples' torment. Li Yi Nuo's master kills the elder in the assembly hall for endangering her.
characters.name: Hostile sect elder

characters.description: The returning captain of the ship carrying Sen. He values reaching his family safely over voyages that could keep his crew away from home for years, and he discusses those risks with Sen as a sea spirit beast approaches.
characters.name: Ship captain

characters.description: Li Yi Nuo's formidable protector within her sect. When an elder turns a recovery mission into a near-suicidal assignment for his disciple, he kills the elder in the assembly hall and makes clear that the remaining leadership will answer to him if she does not return.
characters.name: Li Yi Nuo's master

characters.description: An ancient divine turtle who previously guided Sen toward the Five-Fold Body Transformation Manual. He explains that Sen's exposure to divine qi has altered the intended process into an unpredictable six-fold transformation, though he cannot say what its final effects will be.
characters.name: Elder Bo

characters.description: The leader who upholds Li Yi Nuo's assigned mission while rebuking the elders for placing her in needless danger. His intervention compels them to elevate her as the sect's young mistress and provide resources for her task.
characters.name: Sect patriarch

characters.description: The public epithet used for Sen by townspeople who know him as a charitable cultivator. Li Yi Nuo recognizes the blue-robed benefactor bearing this name as the cultivator tracked by her compass.
characters.name: Judgment's Gale

characters.description: Li Yi Nuo's former friend and fellow outer disciple, killed by a dual cultivator connected to a rival sect. Her death drives Li Yi Nuo to seek practical instruction against dual cultivators after internal politics prevent her own sect from supporting the pursuit of vengeance.
characters.name: Xia

characters.description: A powerful, many-tailed spirit fox who can change shape and create illusions. An old associate of Feng Ming, he addresses Sen as a junior brother and invokes a dangerous favor Sen owes him, insisting that Li Yi Nuo come along.
characters.name: Laughing River

characters.description: An androgynous fox cultivator determined to stop Laughing River from obtaining the object he seeks. The infiltrator hides both body and surroundings beneath layered illusions, defeats Sen after he begins countering the deception, drugs him, and leaves to attack Laughing River.
characters.name: Fox infiltrator

characters.description: Laughing River's descendant and the fox infiltrator who drugged Sen, wounded her grandfather, and abducted Li Yi Nuo. She opposes Laughing River's attempt to claim the ruins treasure, while her strong concealment and illusion craft make both pursuit and direct confrontation difficult.
characters.name: Misty Peak

characters.description: Sen's Ghost Panther family and companion from earlier volumes. Her inability to freely return to panther form remains an important unresolved concern, and Sen regards her safety and future as personal obligations rather than matters he can leave to chance.
characters.name: Falling Leaf

characters.description: The leader of a spider brood living near the temple ruins. Aware that Sen has killed spiders before, she accepts a narrow non-aggression agreement under which he stays near the cleared ruins and later departs toward the road while her brood observes without interfering.
characters.name: Spider matriarch

characters.description: An individual spider from the local matriarch's brood whom Sen protects from a fire eagle. After Sen retrieves the eagle's remains and returns to his shelter, this spider stays outside when the rest of its escort leaves.
characters.name: Saved spider watcher

characters.description: An ancient monk who oversees the temple at the center of the city's mandala. He tells Sen that every traveller must finish an individual path before reuniting with the others, explains that the defenses test whether Laughing River is ready to ascend, and agrees to provide the spatial treasure.
characters.name: Temple caretaker

characters.description: The spider spirit beast Sen saved from a fire eagle, now identified on his separate mandala path. He regards Sen as a benefactor, follows the path set before him instead of taking tempting branches, and meets a distant transcendent ancestor who intends to choose boons for him.
characters.name: Glimmer of Night

characters.description: A celestial-scale ancestor who receives Glimmer of Night at the end of his cosmic web-like mandala path. She treats him as one of her distant children and, after he declines to request any reward, decides that she will select suitable boons for him herself.
characters.name: Transcendent spider matriarch

characters.description: A spear-wielding devil directing the horde's pursuit as Sen's party leaves the ruins. It is physically stronger than Sen, intelligent enough to single him out, and violently hostile to living creatures and divine power. Its first spear strike leaves devilish qi in Sen's chest.
characters.name: Intelligent red-eyed devil

characters.description: A child previously given a qi-marked necklace by Sen. Her extreme fear reaches him through that lingering connection after her village is burned. Sen follows the signal to a remote camp and finds her caged with other survivors, making their rescue his immediate priority.
characters.name: Orphaned village girl

characters.description: One of Sen's established teachers from earlier volumes. Feng Ming remains part of the formidable circle of mentors whose instruction shaped Sen before this volume.
characters.name: Feng Ming

characters.description: An established cultivator from Sen's earlier travels, distinct from Feng Ming.
characters.name: Feng

characters.description: A returning elder and protector whom Sen addresses as his uncle. Kho belongs to the small circle Sen treats as family and trusts more deeply than any sect or institution, making him one of the established personal bonds carried into this volume.
characters.name: Kho

characters.description: Sen's established spear teacher from earlier volumes and one of the formidable cultivators responsible for his martial education. Jaw-Long remains part of Sen's trusted circle and a major influence on the spear skills Sen carries into this volume.
characters.name: Jaw-Long

characters.description: A returning master alchemist, Jaw-Long's wife, and an established alchemical mentor to Sen.
characters.name: Caihong

characters.description: A powerful returning alchemist whose secluded domain shelters Falling Leaf. The cultivator is an established patron and alchemical mentor to Sen.
characters.name: Nascent-soul cultivator
